this.source = source;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 保存对话到文件\r\n     */\r\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\r\n        // 确保目录存在\r\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\r\n\r\n        // 生成文件名\r\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\r\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\r\n\r\n        // 检查是否需要更新\r\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\r\n\r\n        if (shouldSave) {\r\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\r\n            \r\n            // 上报文件保存事件（仅登录用户）\r\n            trackEventIfLoggedIn(TelemetryEvents.FILE_SAVED_LOCALLY, {\r\n                source: this.source,\r\n                session_id: composer.composerId,\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return filepath;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件名\r\n     */\r\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\r\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\r\n        \r\n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\r\n     */\r\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\r\n        // 移除特殊字符\r\n        return title\r\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\r\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\r\n            .toLowerCase()\r\n            .substring(0, 50);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 检查是否需要保存\r\n     */\r\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\r\n        try {\r\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\r\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\r\n        } catch {\r\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * 数据库监听器\r\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\r\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\r\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './cursor-database-reader';\r\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './cursor-conversation-builder';\r\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './cursor-markdown-generator';\r\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\r\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './cursor-workspace-filter';\r\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\r\nimport { SqliteLoader } from '../../sqlite-loader';\r\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\r\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\r\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\r\n\r\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\r\ninterface CachedSession {\r\n    title: string;\r\n    session_id: string;\r\n    workspace_path?: string;\r\n    workspace_name?: string;\r\n    messages: Message[];\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\r\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\r\n    private dbPath: string;\r\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\r\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\r\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\r\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\r\n    private t: Translator;\r\n    private extensionPath: string;\r\n    \r\n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\r\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\r\n\r\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting, extensionPath?: string) {\r\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\r\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\r\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\r\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\r\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath || '';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 启动监听\r\n     */\r\n    start(): void {\r\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\r\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cursor' });\r\n\r\n        // 1. 立即执行一次本地同步\r\n        this.syncNow();\r\n\r\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\r\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\r\n            persistent: true,\r\n            ignoreInitial: true\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\r\n            this.scheduleSync();\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\r\n        setInterval(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\r\n\r\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\r\n        setInterval(() => {\r\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\r\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\r\n\r\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\r\n        setTimeout(() => {\r\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\r\n        }, 5000);\r\n\r\n        console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 停止监听\r\n     */\r\n    stop(): void {\r\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\r\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\r\n\r\n        if (this.watcher) {\r\n            this.watcher.close();\r\n        }\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\r\n     */\r\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\r\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 2000);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 立即执行本地同步\r\n     */\r\n    syncNow(): void {\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n\r\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\r\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\r\n\r\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\r\n            console.error('Local sync failed:', error);\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 立即执行云端同步\r\n     */\r\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n\r\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\r\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\r\n\r\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\r\n            console.error('Cloud sync failed:', error);\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\r\n     */\r\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\r\n        let reader: CursorDatabaseReader;\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n            // 首先尝试创建数据库读取器\r\n            reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\r\n\r\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\r\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\r\n                errorMessage.includes('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR') ||\r\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\r\n\r\n                console.log('Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to fix...');\r\n\r\n                // 尝试重新加载 SQLite3\r\n                const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(this.extensionPath);\r\n                const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\r\n\r\n                if (!sqliteReady) {\r\n                    throw new Error('Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary. Please check the extension logs for more details.');\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // 重新尝试创建数据库读取器\r\n                reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\r\n            } else {\r\n                throw error;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\r\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n            // 获取所有 composer\r\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\r\n\r\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\r\n\r\n            for (const composer of composers) {\r\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\r\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n                    composer,\r\n                    reader\r\n                );\r\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\r\n                    continue;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\r\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\r\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\r\n\r\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\r\n\r\n                // 获取 bubbles\r\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\r\n\r\n                // 构建对话\r\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\r\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\r\n\r\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\r\n\r\n                // 生成 Markdown\r\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\r\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\r\n\r\n                // 保存到本地\r\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\r\n\r\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\r\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\r\n\r\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\r\n                sessionsToCache.push({\r\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\r\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\r\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\r\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\r\n                    messages: messages,\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 更新缓存\r\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\r\n\r\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\r\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\r\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\r\n                const now = new Date();\r\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\r\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\r\n            }\r\n        } finally {\r\n            reader.close();\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\r\n     */\r\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\r\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\r\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\r\n\r\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\r\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\r\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\r\n            source: 'cursor',\r\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\r\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\r\n                title: session.title,\r\n                session_id: session.session_id,\r\n                workspace_path: session.workspace_path,\r\n                workspace_name: session.workspace_name,\r\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\r\n            }));\r\n\r\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\r\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\r\n\r\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\r\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\r\n                source: 'cursor',\r\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\r\n            });\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\r\n\r\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\r\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\r\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\r\n                source: 'cursor',\r\n                error_message: errorMessage,\r\n            });\r\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n",

}

export chats\r\n * that belong to the currently open workspace.\r\n */\r\nexport class WorkspaceFilter {\r\n    private currentWorkspacePath: string;\r\n\r\n    constructor(workspacePath: string) {\r\n        this.currentWorkspacePath = this.normalizePath(workspacePath || '');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Returns true if the composer belongs to the current workspace.\r\n     */\r\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        reader: CursorDatabaseReader\r\n    ): boolean {\r\n        if (!this.currentWorkspacePath) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\r\n        if (headers.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const firstBubbleId = headers[0].bubbleId;\r\n        const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, [firstBubbleId]);\r\n        if (bubbles.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const bubble = bubbles[0] as Bubble & { workspaceProjectDir?: string };\r\n\r\n        // Prefer workspaceUris when available\r\n        if (bubble.workspaceUris && bubble.workspaceUris.length > 0) {\r\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.uriToPath(bubble.workspaceUris[0]);\r\n            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\r\n                return true;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Fallback to workspaceProjectDir\r\n        if ((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir) {\r\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.normalizePath((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir);\r\n            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\r\n                return true;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return false;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Convert a file:// URI to a filesystem path.\r\n     */\r\n    private uriToPath(uri: string): string {\r\n        try {\r\n            const decoded = decodeURIComponent(uri);\r\n            let fsPath = decoded.replace(/^file:\\/\\/\\//, '');\r\n\r\n            // Windows drive letters are URL encoded (e.g., d%3A)\r\n            if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n                fsPath = fsPath.replace(/%3A/gi, ':');\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            return this.normalizePath(fsPath);\r\n        } catch {\r\n            return '';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Normalize paths for reliable comparison.\r\n     */\r\n    private normalizePath(filepath: string): string {\r\n        if (!filepath) return '';\r\n\r\n        let normalized = filepath.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\r\n\r\n        if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n            normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // remove trailing slash\r\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\/$/, '');\r\n\r\n        return normalized;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private pathsMatch(path1: string, path2: string): boolean {\r\n        return this.normalizePath(path1) === this.normalizePath(path2);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n",

## 🤖 Assistant #15 (Agent)

_2025-12-27 13:07Z_

根据代码分析，我为你整理了一套完整的 Ubuntu 调试方案：

## 🔧 调试方法

### 1. 打开开发者工具查看日志

在 Cursor/VS Code 中执行：
- **快捷键**: `Ctrl+Shift+I` 或 `F12`
- **命令面板**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` → 输入 `Developer: Toggle Developer Tools`

打开后切换到 **Console** 标签，查看关键日志：

```
LLM Chat History Extension activated
Cursor database found, starting Cursor watcher  ← 或者 "not found"
Found X composers                                ← 找到多少对话
```

### 2. 检查关键路径

在 Linux 上，Cursor 数据库路径应该是：
```
~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb
```

在终端执行检查：
```bash
# 检查数据库文件是否存在
ls -la ~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb

# 检查文件大小（应该 > 0）
stat ~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb
```

### 3. 检查 SQLite 二进制兼容性

这是 Linux 上最常见的问题。查看开发者工具控制台是否有类似错误：
```
NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch
compiled against a different Node.js version
```

### 4. 添加更详细的调试日志

你可以临时修改插件代码来增加调试输出。我创建一个诊断脚本：

我创建了一个诊断脚本。以下是完整的调试流程：

---

## 🛠️ Ubuntu 调试完整指南

### 方法一：使用诊断脚本（推荐）

1. **在 Ubuntu 上打开 Cursor**
2. **打开开发者工具**: `Ctrl+Shift+I` 或 `Help → Toggle Developer Tools`
3. **切换到 Console 标签**
4. **复制粘贴以下诊断脚本并回车执行**：

```javascript
// 复制 scripts/diagnose.js 的内容到控制台执行
```

脚本会输出：
- 平台信息（Linux/Electron 版本）
- 数据库路径和状态
- SQLite 二进制是否兼容
- 工作区和输出目录状态
- 数据库内容检查

### 方法二：手动检查步骤

#### 步骤 1：检查数据库文件
```bash
# 检查 Cursor 数据库是否存在
ls -la ~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb

# 应该输出类似：
# -rw-r--r-- 1 user user 12345678 Dec 27 10:00 state.vscdb
```

#### 步骤 2：检查输出目录
```bash
# 在你的工作区目录下检查
ls -la /path/to/your/workspace/.llm-chat-history/history/

# 如果没有这个目录，说明保存可能失败了
```

#### 步骤 3：检查 Console 日志关键信息

| 日志信息 | 含义 |
|---------|------|
| `Cursor database not found` | 数据库路径问题 |
| `NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch` | SQLite 二进制不兼容 |
| `Found 0 composers` | 数据库中没有对话 |
| `No workspace folder open` | 没有打开工作区 |

### 方法三：启用详细日志

临时在 Cursor 的设置中添加：
```json
{
    "chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode": true
}
```

---

## ⚠️ 常见问题及解决方案

### 问题 1：SQLite 二进制不兼容（最常见）

**症状**：控制台显示 `NODE_MODULE_VERSION` 错误

**解决方案**：
```bash
# 在你的 Ubuntu 上重新编译 better-sqlite3
cd ~/.vscode/extensions/clarkzhang.llm-chat-history-*/
# 或 Cursor 扩展路径
cd ~/.cursor/extensions/clarkzhang.llm-chat-history-*/

npm rebuild better-sqlite3
```

### 问题 2：工作区过滤导致没有匹配

**症状**：`Found X composers` 但没有文件保存

**原因**：插件只保存**当前工作区**的对话。如果对话是在其他工作区创建的，不会保存。

**验证**：在同一个工作区中进行一次新对话，然后执行 `Save Chat History Now`

### 问题 3：没有打开工作区

**症状**：`No workspace folder open`

**解决方案**：必须使用 `File → Open Folder` 打开一个文件夹，而不是直接打开单个文件

---

## 📤 需要你提供的信息

请在 Ubuntu 上执行诊断后，把以下信息发给我：

1. **Console 日志的完整输出**（特别是带 `LLM Chat` 或 `better-sqlite3` 的行）
2. **诊断脚本的输出结果**
3. **Cursor/VS Code 版本号**（Help → About）

这样我可以帮你定位具体问题！

>

> - `require` 是可用的

## 🤖 Assistant #24 (Agent)

_2025-12-27 13:14Z_

这个脚本可能还是有问题。让我提供一个**更简单的方法**：

---

## 🔧 简化版调试方法

### 方法一：切换到 Extension Host 控制台（推荐）

1. 打开开发者工具 `Ctrl+Shift+I`
2. 在 Console 标签页的**左上角下拉菜单**中，选择 **"Extension Host"**（不是默认的 "top"）
3. 然后粘贴运行以下简化脚本：

```javascript
// 在 Extension Host 上下文中运行
console.log('=== LLM Chat History Diagnostic ===');
console.log('Platform:', process.platform);
console.log('Arch:', process.arch);
console.log('Electron:', process.versions.electron);
console.log('Home:', process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE);

const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');
const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE;

// Linux Cursor 数据库路径
const dbPath = path.join(homeDir, '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb');
console.log('DB Path:', dbPath);
console.log('DB Exists:', fs.existsSync(dbPath));

// 测试 SQLite
try {
    const Database = require('better-sqlite3');
    const db = new Database(':memory:');
    db.close();
    console.log('✅ SQLite OK');
} catch (e) {
    console.log('❌ SQLite Error:', e.message);
}

// 检查工作区
const vscode = require('vscode');
console.log('Workspace:', vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath || 'NONE');
```

### 方法二：直接在 Ubuntu 终端检查

在终端运行这些命令，把输出发给我：

```bash
# 1. 检查 Cursor 数据库
echo "=== Database Check ==="
ls -la ~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb 2>/dev/null || echo "Database NOT FOUND"

# 2. 检查 Cursor 版本
echo -e "\n=== Cursor Version ==="
cat ~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/storage.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"version":"[^"]*"' | head -1 || echo "Unknown"

# 3. 检查插件安装
echo -e "\n=== Extension Installed ==="
ls -la ~/.cursor/extensions/ | grep llm-chat-history || ls -la ~/.vscode/extensions/ | grep llm-chat-history || echo "Extension NOT FOUND"

# 4. 检查工作区的输出目录
echo -e "\n=== Output Directory (在你的项目目录下运行) ==="
ls -la .llm-chat-history/history/ 2>/dev/null || echo "Output directory NOT FOUND"

# 5. 检查 SQLite 二进制文件
echo -e "\n=== SQLite Binary ==="
EXTPATH=$(ls -d ~/.cursor/extensions/clarkzhang.llm-chat-history-* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
if [ -n "$EXTPATH" ]; then
    ls -la "$EXTPATH/node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/"
else
    echo "Extension path not found"
fi
```

### 方法三：查看插件输出日志

1. 在 Cursor 中打开 **Output** 面板：`View → Output` 或 `Ctrl+Shift+U`
2. 在右上角下拉菜单中选择 **"Log (Extension Host)"**
3. 搜索 `LLM Chat` 或 `better-sqlite3` 相关的日志

---

  "contents": "/**\n * Blackbox AI 文件监听器\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { BlackboxReader } from './blackboxai-reader';\nimport { BlackboxConversationBuilder } from './blackboxai-conversation-builder';\nimport { BlackboxMarkdownGenerator } from './blackboxai-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { BlackboxWorkspaceFilter } from './blackboxai-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    workspace_path?: string;\n    workspace_name?: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class BlackboxWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private storageDir: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: BlackboxWorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n\n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(storageDir: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting) {\n        this.storageDir = storageDir;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new BlackboxWorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting watcher for:', this.storageDir);\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        const conversationsDir = path.join(this.storageDir, 'conversations');\n\n        if (!conversationsDir) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Conversations directory not found:', conversationsDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(conversationsDir, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true,\n            depth: 1,\n            awaitWriteFinish: { stabilityThreshold: 500, pollInterval: 100 }\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('add', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] File added:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', (filePath) => {\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] File changed:', filePath);\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('error', (error) => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Watcher error:', error);\n            trackError('watcher_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n        });\n\n        // 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000);\n\n        // 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000);\n\n        // 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'blackboxai' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] Starting local sync');\n        const reader = new BlackboxReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            const conversations = reader.getAllConversations();\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Found ${conversations.length} conversations`);\n\n            if (conversations.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n\n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const conversation of conversations) {\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const builder = new BlackboxConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(conversation);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                const generator = new BlackboxMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(conversation, conversation.messages);\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'blackboxai');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                // 确保 toolResults 和 toolUses 格式正确\n                const normalizedMessages: Message[] = messages.map(msg => ({\n                    ...msg,\n                    toolUses: msg.toolUses?.map((tu: any) => ({\n                        name: tu.name,\n                        markdown: typeof tu.input === 'string' ? tu.input : JSON.stringify(tu.input),\n                    })),\n                    toolResults: msg.toolResults?.map((tr: any) => ({\n                        name: tr.toolUseId || tr.name || 'unknown',\n                        result: tr.content || tr.result,\n                    })),\n                }));\n\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: conversation.title || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: conversation.id,\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\n                    messages: normalizedMessages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            if (savedCount > 0) {\n                const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n                if (automationProvider) {\n                    const now = new Date();\n                    const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                    automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, savedCount);\n                }\n            }\n\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI] Local sync completed');\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[BlackboxAI] Error during sync:', error);\n            trackError('sync_error', String(error), 'blackboxai');\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if '...' : ''}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\r\n                else if (item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\r\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\r\n            return content.text;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function getBlackboxStoragePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n\r\n    const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined || process.env.VSCODE_PID !== undefined;\r\n    const isCursor = process.env.CURSOR_PID !== undefined || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER !== undefined;\r\n\r\n    let appName = 'Code';\r\n    if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {\r\n        appName = 'Cursor';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    } else {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n",

> 现在我完全理解问题了！
>
> 问题出在 `extractWorkspaceFolder` 函数上。它尝试从 UI messages 中提取 `Current Working Directory` 信息，但这个匹配模式可能不适合当前的 Blackbox AI 数据格式。
>
> 根据代码：
> ```javascript
> const cwdMatch = parsed.request.match(/Current Working Directory \(([^)]+)\)/);
> if (cwdMatch && cwdMatch[1]) {
>     // 转换路径格式：d:/Projects/fang -> d:\Projects\fang
>     return cwdMatch[1].replace(/\//g, '\\');
> }
> ```
>
> 1. 它在 `api_req_started` 消息中查找工作区路径
> 2. 如果找不到，`workspaceFolder` 就是 `undefined`
> 3. 然后在 `belongsToCurrentWorkspace` 中，如果 `workspaceFolder` 是 `undefined`，直接返回 `false`
>
> 问题的根源是 **Blackbox AI 的数据格式可能已经改变，或者这个特定的对话没有包含工作区路径信息**。
>
> 解决方案：
> 1. 添加更多的调试日志来查看实际的 `workspaceFolder` 值
> 2. 或者修改 workspace filter 的逻辑，当 `workspaceFolder` 为空时，默认允许保存
>
> 让我提供两个方案：
> 1. 快速修复：临时禁用工作区过滤
> 2. 长期修复：添加更多调试日志，找出为什么 workspaceFolder 为空

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * Blackbox AI 工作区过滤器\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport { BlackboxConversation } from './blackboxai-types';\r\n\r\nexport class BlackboxWorkspaceFilter {\r\n    constructor(private workspaceRoot: string) {\r\n        console.log('[BlackboxAI] WorkspaceFilter initialized with workspace:', workspaceRoot);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conversation: BlackboxConversation): boolean {\r\n        console.log(`[BlackboxAI] Checking workspace for conversation \"${conversation.title}\" (id: ${conversation.id})`);\r\n        console.log(`[BlackboxAI]   - Conversation workspaceFolder: ${conversation.workspaceFolder || '(empty/undefined)'}`);\r\n        console.log(`[BlackboxAI]   - Current workspaceRoot: ${this.workspaceRoot}`);\r\n\r\n        // 如果没有工作区信息，允许保存（兼容旧版本数据或无法提取工作区的情况）\r\n        if (!conversation.workspaceFolder) {\r\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI]   -> ALLOWED (no workspaceFolder in conversation data, defaulting to current workspace)');\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        try {\r\n            const normalizedWorkspace = path.normalize(this.workspaceRoot).toLowerCase();\r\n            const normalizedConversation = path.normalize(conversation.workspaceFolder).toLowerCase();\r\n\r\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI]   - Normalized workspace: ${normalizedWorkspace}`);\r\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI]   - Normalized conversation: ${normalizedConversation}`);\r\n\r\n            // 检查路径是否匹配或包含关系\r\n            const matches = normalizedConversation.includes(normalizedWorkspace) ||\r\n                   normalizedWorkspace.includes(normalizedConversation);\r\n            \r\n            console.log(`[BlackboxAI]   -> ${matches ? 'ALLOWED' : 'FILTERED OUT'} (workspace ${matches ? 'matches' : 'does not match'})`);\r\n            return matches;\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            // 路径规范化失败时，允许保存（宽容策略）\r\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Failed to normalize workspace path:', error);\r\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI]   -> ALLOWED (path normalization failed, using fallback)');\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    filterConversations(conversations: BlackboxConversation[]): BlackboxConversation[] {\r\n        return conversations.filter(conv => this.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(conv));\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n"

>
> 这是因为 BlackboxAI reader 中的 `extractWorkspaceFolder` 函数将正斜杠转换为反斜杠（这是为 Windows 设计的）：
> ```javascript
> return cwdMatch[1].replace(/\//g, '\\');
> ```
>
> 我需要修复这个问题。在 Linux 上应该使用正斜杠。让我修改 workspace filter 来处理这种跨平台的路径问题。

          id: `msg_${Date.now()}_${Math.random()}`,\r\n                    role: msg.role,\r\n                    content: this.extractTextContent(msg.content),\r\n                    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\r\n                    model: msg.model\r\n                };\r\n                messages.push(message);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return messages;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    private extractTextContent(content: any): string {\r\n        if (typeof content === 'string') {\r\n            return content;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\r\n            const parts: string[] = [];\r\n            \r\n            for (const item of content) {\r\n                if (!item) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 处理 text 类型\r\n                if (item.type === 'text' && item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 thinking 类型（思考过程）\r\n                else if (item.type === 'thinking' && item.thinking) {\r\n                    parts.push(`💭 思考过程：\\n${item.thinking}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 tool_use 类型（简单描述）\r\n                else (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\r\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \r\n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \r\n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\r\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\r\n                else if (item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\r\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\r\n            return content.text;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function getBlackboxStoragePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n\r\n    const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined || process.env.VSCODE_PID !== undefined;\r\n    const isCursor = process.env.CURSOR_PID !== undefined || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER !== undefined;\r\n\r\n    let appName = 'Code';\r\n    if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {\r\n        appName = 'Cursor';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    } else {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/blackboxapp.blackboxagent`);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n"
}

'matches' : 'does not match'})`);\n            return matches;\n        } catch (error) {\n            // 路径规范化失败时，允许保存（宽容策略）\n            console.warn('[BlackboxAI] Failed to normalize workspace path:', error);\n            console.log('[BlackboxAI]   -> ALLOWED (path normalization failed, using fallback)');\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 统一路径格式：\n     * - 将反斜杠转换为正斜杠\n     * - 转换为小写（用于比较）\n     * - 移除末尾斜杠\n     */\n    private normalizePath(filepath: string): string {\n        if (!filepath) return '';\n        \n        // 统一使用正斜杠\n        let normalized = filepath.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\n        \n        // 转换为小写以便比较\n        normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();\n        \n        // 移除末尾斜杠\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\/$/, '');\n        \n        return normalized;\n    }"
}

## 🚀 快速测试方法

### 方式一：直接替换编译后的文件（最快）

在 Ubuntu 上执行以下命令，将新编译的文件复制到插件目录：

```bash
# 1. 找到插件路径
EXT_PATH=$(ls -d ~/.vscode/extensions/clarkzhang.llm-chat-history-* 2>/dev/null | head -1)
echo "Extension path: $EXT_PATH"

# 2. 备份原文件
cp "$EXT_PATH/dist/agents/blackboxai/blackboxai-workspace-filter.js" "$EXT_PATH/dist/agents/blackboxai/blackboxai-workspace-filter.js.bak"
cp "$EXT_PATH/dist/agents/blackboxai/blackboxai-reader.js" "$EXT_PATH/dist/agents/blackboxai/blackboxai-reader.js.bak"
```

然后从 Windows 上复制这两个新编译的文件到 Ubuntu：
- `D:\Projects\llm_chat_history\dist\agents\blackboxai\blackboxai-workspace-filter.js`
- `D:\Projects\llm_chat_history\dist\agents\blackboxai\blackboxai-reader.js`

复制到：
- `$EXT_PATH/dist/agents/blackboxai/`

最后**重启 VS Code**。

### 方式二：重新打包 VSIX 并安装

```powershell
# 在 Windows 上打包
cd D:\Projects\llm_chat_history
npx vsce package --no-dependencies
```

然后把 `llm-chat-history-0.3.3.vsix` 复制到 Ubuntu 并安装。

/media/sf_llm_chat_history  (Linux 使用正斜杠)

**修复**：

2. `blackboxai-workspace-filter.ts` - 统一将所有路径的 `\` 转换为 `/` 后再比较

{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * Cline 工作区过滤器\r\n * 判断任务是否属于当前工作区\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport { ClineTask } from './cline-types';\r\n\r\nexport class ClineWorkspaceFilter {\r\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string) {\r\n        this.workspaceRoot = this.normalizePath(workspaceRoot);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 判断任务是否属于当前工作区\r\n     */\r\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task: ClineTask): boolean {\r\n        // 如果任务有明确的工作区路径\r\n        if (task.workspaceRoot) {\r\n            return this.isSameOrSubPath(task.workspaceRoot, this.workspaceRoot);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 尝试从 UI messages 中查找路径线索\r\n        const uiMessages = task.uiMessages.messages || [];\r\n\r\n        for (const msg of uiMessages) {\r\n            // 检查文件路径\r\n            if (msg.path && this.isSameOrSubPath(msg.path, this.workspaceRoot)) {\r\n                return true;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 检查命令执行路径\r\n            if (msg.command && typeof msg.command === 'string' && msg.command.includes(this.workspaceRoot)) {\r\n                return true;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 如果无法确定，采用包容策略（返回 true）\r\n        // 这样可以确保任务不会被意外过滤掉\r\n        return true;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 判断路径是否相同或为子路径\r\n     */\r\n    private isSameOrSubPath(targetPath: string, basePath: string): boolean {\r\n        const normalizedTarget = this.normalizePath(targetPath);\r\n        const normalizedBase = this.normalizePath(basePath);\r\n        \r\n        // 完全匹配\r\n        if (normalizedTarget === normalizedBase) {\r\n            return true;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 检查是否为子路径\r\n        return normalizedTarget.startsWith(normalizedBase + path.sep);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 规范化路径\r\n     */\r\n    private normalizePath(p: string): string {\r\n        // 转换为绝对路径并规范化\r\n        let normalized = path.resolve(p);\r\n        \r\n        // 统一路径分隔符（Windows）\r\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\r\n        \r\n        // 移除尾部斜杠\r\n        if (normalized.endsWith('/') && normalized.length > 1) {\r\n            normalized = normalized.slice(0, -1);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return normalized.toLowerCase();\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

   ClineTaskMetadata,\r\n    ClineApiConversation,\r\n    ClineUIMessages\r\n} from './cline-types';\r\n\r\nexport class ClineReader {\r\n    private tasksDir: string;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(private storageDir: string) {\r\n        this.tasksDir = path.join(storageDir, 'tasks');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取所有任务\r\n     */\r\n    getAllTasks(): ClineTask[] {\r\n        // 读取任务历史索引\r\n        const historyPath = path.join(this.storageDir, 'state', 'taskHistory.json');\r\n        \r\n        if (!fs.existsSync(historyPath)) {\r\n            console.warn('[Cline] Task history file not found:', historyPath);\r\n            return [];\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        let taskItems: ClineTaskHistory['tasks'];\r\n        try {\r\n            const content = fs.readFileSync(historyPath, 'utf-8');\r\n            const parsed = JSON.parse(content);\r\n\r\n            if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {\r\n                taskItems = parsed;\r\n            } else if (parsed.tasks && Array.isArray(parsed.tasks)) {\r\n                taskItems = parsed.tasks;\r\n            } else {\r\n                console.warn('[Cline] Unexpected task history format');\r\n                return [];\r\n            }\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('[Cline] Failed to parse task history:', error);\r\n            return [];\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (!taskItems || taskItems.length === 0) {\r\n            return [];\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const tasks: ClineTask[] = [];\r\n\r\n        for (const taskItem of taskItems) {\r\n            const task = this.getTask(taskItem.id);\r\n            if (task) {\r\n                tasks.push(task);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return tasks;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取指定任务\r\n     */\r\n    getTask(taskId: string): ClineTask | null {\r\n        const taskDir = path.join(this.tasksDir, taskId);\r\n        \r\n        if (!fs.existsSync(taskDir)) {\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 首先读取 UI messages（因为metadata处理需要用到它）\r\n            const uiMessagesPath = path.join(taskDir, };\r\n\r\n            // 读取 metadata\r\n            const metadataPath = path.join(taskDir, 'task_metadata.json');\r\n            const rawMetadata = fs.existsSync(metadataPath)\r\n                ? JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(metadataPath, 'utf-8'))\r\n                : {};\r\n\r\n            // 处理cline的metadata格式，转换为标准格式\r\n            const metadata: ClineTaskMetadata = this.processClineMetadata(rawMetadata, taskId, uiMessages);\r\n\r\n            // 读取 API conversation\r\n            const apiConvPath = path.join(taskDir, 'api_conversation_history.json');\r\n            const apiConversation: ClineApiConversation = fs.existsSync(apiConvPath)\r\n                ? this.parseClineDataFile(apiConvPath)\r\n                : { messages: [] };\r\n            \r\n            // 尝试读取工作区路径（可能在 UI messages 中）\r\n            const workspaceRoot = this.extractWorkspaceRoot(uiMessages);\r\n            \r\n            return {\r\n                id: taskId,\r\n                metadata,\r\n                apiConversation,\r\n                uiMessages,\r\n                workspaceRoot\r\n            };\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error(`Failed to read task ${taskId}:`, error);\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理cline的metadata格式，转换为标准格式\r\n     */\r\n    private processClineMetadata(rawMetadata: any, taskId: string, uiMessages: ClineUIMessages): ClineTaskMetadata {\r\n        // 从model_usage中获取时间戳\r\n        const ts = rawMetadata.model_usage?.[0]?.ts || Date.now();\r\n\r\n        // 从UI消息中尝试提取任务名称\r\n        let taskName = 'Untitled Task';\r\n        if (uiMessages.messages && uiMessages.messages.length > 0) {\r\n            const firstMessage = uiMessages.messages[0];\r\n            if (firstMessage.text && typeof firstMessage.text === 'string') {\r\n                // 提取第一行作为任务名称\r\n                const lines = firstMessage.text.split('\\n');\r\n                if (lines[0] && lines[0].trim()) {\r\n                    taskName = lines[0].trim().substring(0, 100); // 限制长度\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 从UI消息中提取token信息\r\n        let tokensIn = 0;\r\n        let tokensOut = 0;\r\n        let totalCost = 0;\r\n\r\n        if (uiMessages.messages) {\r\n            for (const msg of uiMessages.messages) {\r\n                if (msg.metrics?.tokens) {\r\n                    tokensIn += msg.metrics.tokens.prompt || 0;\r\n                    tokensOut += msg.metrics.tokens.completion || 0;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return {\r\n            version: '1.0',\r\n            id: taskId,\r\n            ts: ts,\r\n            task: taskName,\r\n            tokensIn: tokensIn,\r\n            tokensOut: tokensOut,\r\n            totalCost: totalCost\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建默认元数据\r\n     */\r\n    private createDefaultMetadata(taskId: string): ClineTaskMetadata {\r\n        return {\r\n            version: '1.0',\r\n            id: taskId,\r\n            ts: Date.now(),\r\n            task: 'Untitled Task',\r\n            tokensIn: 0,\r\n            tokensOut: 0,\r\n            totalCost: 0\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 解析cline数据文件（支持直接数组和包装对象格式）\r\n     */\r\n    private parseClineDataFile(filePath: string): any {\r\n        const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');\r\n        const parsed = JSON.parse(content);\r\n\r\n        // 处理直接数组格式（cline的实际格式）\r\n        if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {\r\n            return { messages: parsed };\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 处理包装对象格式（兼容旧格式）\r\n        return parsed;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 从 UI messages 中提取工作区路径\r\n     */\r\n    private extractWorkspaceRoot(uiMessages: ClineUIMessages): string | undefined {\r\n        // 尝试从 UI messages 中找到包含路径信息的消息\r\n        for (const msg of uiMessages.messages) {\r\n            // 检查path字段\r\n            if (msg.path) {\r\n                const dirPath = path.dirname(msg.path);\r\n                if (dirPath && dirPath !== '.') {\r\n                    return dirPath;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 检查text字段中的环境信息（cline格式）\r\n            if (msg.text && typeof msg.text === 'string') {\r\n                const cwdMatch = msg.text.match(/Current Working Directory \\(([^)]+)\\)/);\r\n                if (cwdMatch && cwdMatch[1]) {\r\n                    return cwdMatch[1];\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 检查command字段\r\n            if (msg.command && typeof msg.command === 'string') {\r\n                // 如果command包含当前工作区路径，返回该路径\r\n                if (msg.command.includes(this.storageDir)) {\r\n                    return this.storageDir;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        return undefined;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 检查存储目录是否存在\r\n     */\r\n    exists(): boolean {\r\n        return fs.existsSync(this.storageDir) && fs.existsSync(this.tasksDir);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 获取 Cline 存储路径\r\n */\r\nexport function getClineStoragePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n\r\n    // 检测当前运行环境\r\n    // 优先检查VSCode环境变量，然后检查Cursor环境变量\r\n    const isVSCode = // 默认使用VSCode路径，因为cline插件主要在VSCode中运行\r\n    let appName = 'Code'; // VSCode\r\n\r\n    // 如果明确检测到Cursor环境，使用Cursor路径\r\n    if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {\r\n        appName = 'Cursor';\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    console.log('[DEBUG] getClineStoragePath:');\r\n    console.log('  - platform:', platform);\r\n    console.log('  - homeDir:', homeDir);\r\n    console.log('  - VSCODE_CWD:', process.env.VSCODE_CWD);\r\n    console.log('  - VSCODE_PID:', process.env.VSCODE_PID);\r\n    console.log('  - CURSOR_PID:', process.env.CURSOR_PID);\r\n    console.log('  - CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER:', {\r\n        this.currentWorkspacePath = this.normalizePath(workspacePath || '');\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Returns true if the composer belongs to the current workspace.\r\n     */\r\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\r\n        composer: ComposerData,\r\n        reader: CursorDatabaseReader\r\n    ): boolean {\r\n        if (!this.currentWorkspacePath) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\r\n        if (headers.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const firstBubbleId = headers[0].bubbleId;\r\n        const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, [firstBubbleId]);\r\n        if (bubbles.length === 0) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const bubble = bubbles[0] as Bubble & { workspaceProjectDir?: string };\r\n\r\n        // Prefer workspaceUris when available\r\n        if (bubble.workspaceUris && bubble.workspaceUris.length > 0) {\r\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.uriToPath(bubble.workspaceUris[0]);\r\n            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\r\n                return true;\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Fallback to workspaceProjectDir\r\n        if ((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir) {\r\n string): string {\r\n        try {\r\n            const decoded = decodeURIComponent(uri);\r\n            let fsPath = decoded.replace(/^file:\\/\\/\\//, '');\r\n\r\n            // Windows drive letters are URL encoded (e.g., d%3A)\r\n            if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n                fsPath = fsPath.replace(/%3A/gi, ':');\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            return this.normalizePath(fsPath);\r\n        } catch {\r\n            return '';\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * Normalize paths for reliable comparison.\r\n     */\r\n    private normalizePath(filepath: string): string {\r\n        if (!filepath) return '';\r\n\r\n        let normalized = filepath.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\r\n\r\n        if (process.platform === 'win32') {\r\n ## 🤖 Assistant #76 (Agent)

_2025-12-27 13:49Z_

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> 现在我找到了所有的问题。让我分析每个文件：
>
> ## 问题汇总
>
> ### 1. `kilo-reader.ts` (第 153 行)
> ```javascript
> return cwdMatch[1].replace(/\//g, '\\');
> ```
> 这个和 BlackboxAI 一样的问题 - 强制将正斜杠转换为反斜杠，在 Linux/Mac 上会出问题。
>
> ### 2. `kilo-workspace-filter.ts` (第 22, 34-35, 42-43 行)
> 使用 `path.normalize()` 和 `path.sep`，这在跨平台时会有问题：
> - `path.sep` 在 Windows 是 `\`，在 Linux/Mac 是 `/`
> - 如果数据中存储的是 Windows 风格路径，在 Linux 上比较会失败
>
> ### 3. `cline-workspace-filter.ts` (第 58 行)
> ```javascript
> return normalizedTarget.startsWith(normalizedBase + path.sep);
> ```
> 同样使用 `path.sep`，会有跨平台问题。
>
> ### 4. `cursor-workspace-filter.ts` (第 85-87 行)
> ```javascript
> if (process.platform === 'win32') {
>     normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();
> }
> ```
> 只在 Windows 上转小写，但如果数据是从 Windows 传过来的，在 Linux 上比较时大小写可能不一致。
>
> 我需要修复这些问题，确保所有路径处理都是跨平台兼容的。

</details>

content === 'string') {\r\n            return content;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (Array.isArray(content)) {\r\n            const parts: string[] = [];\r\n            \r\n            for (const item of content) {\r\n                if (!item) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 处理 text 类型\r\n                if (item.type === 'text' && item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 thinking 类型（Kilo/Cline 的思考过程）\r\n                else if (item.type === 'thinking' && item.thinking) {\r\n                    parts.push(`💭 思考过程：\\n${item.thinking}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 tool_use 类型（简单描述）\r\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_use' && item.name) {\r\n                    parts.push(`🔧 工具调用: ${item.name}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 tool_result 类型\r\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\r\n                    // tool_result 内容可能很长，只取摘要\r\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \r\n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \r\n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\r\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\r\n                else if (item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\r\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\r\n            return content.text;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function getKiloStoragePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n\r\n    const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined || process.env.VSCODE_PID !== undefined;\r\n    const isCursor = process.env.CURSOR_PID !== undefined || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER !== undefined;\r\n\r\n    let appName = 'Code';\r\n    if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {\r\n        appName = 'Cursor';\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (platform === 'win32') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);\r\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);\r\n    } else {\r\n        return path.join(homeDir, `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/kilocode.kilo-code`);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n"
}

  "old_string": "/**\n * Cline 工作区过滤器\n * 判断任务是否属于当前工作区\n */\n\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ClineTask } from './cline-types';\n\nexport class ClineWorkspaceFilter {\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string) {\n        this.workspaceRoot = this.normalizePath(workspaceRoot);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 判断任务是否属于当前工作区\n     */\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task: ClineTask): boolean {\n        // 如果任务有明确的工作区路径\n        if (task.workspaceRoot) {\n            return this.isSameOrSubPath(task.workspaceRoot, this.workspaceRoot);\n        }\n\n        // 尝试从 UI messages 中查找路径线索\n        const uiMessages = task.uiMessages.messages || [];\n\n        for (const msg of uiMessages) {\n            // 检查文件路径\n            if (msg.path && this.isSameOrSubPath(msg.path, this.workspaceRoot)) {\n                return true;\n            }\n\n            // 检查命令执行路径\n            if (msg.command && typeof msg.command === 'string' && msg.command.includes(this.workspaceRoot)) {\n                return true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 如果无法确定，采用包容策略（返回 true）\n        // 这样可以确保任务不会被意外过滤掉\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 判断路径是否相同或为子路径\n     */\n    private isSameOrSubPath(targetPath: string, basePath: string): boolean {\n        const normalizedTarget = this.normalizePath(targetPath);\n        const normalizedBase = this.normalizePath(basePath);\n        \n        // 完全匹配\n        if (normalizedTarget === normalizedBase) {\n            return true;\n        }\n        \n        // 检查是否为子路径\n        return normalizedTarget.startsWith(normalizedBase + path.sep);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 规范化路径\n     */\n    private normalizePath(p: string): string {\n        // 转换为绝对路径并规范化\n        let normalized = path.resolve(p);\n        \n        // 统一路径分隔符（Windows）\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\n        \n        // 移除尾部斜杠\n        if (normalized.endsWith('/') && normalized.length > 1) {\n            normalized = normalized.slice(0, -1);\n        }\n        \n        return normalized.toLowerCase();\n    }\n}",
  "new_string": "/**\n * Cline 工作区过滤器\n * 判断任务是否属于当前工作区\n */\n\nimport { ClineTask } from './cline-types';\n\nexport class ClineWorkspaceFilter {\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string) {\n        this.workspaceRoot = this.normalizePath(workspaceRoot);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 判断任务是否属于当前工作区\n     */\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task: ClineTask): boolean {\n        // 如果任务有明确的工作区路径\n        if (task.workspaceRoot) {\n            return this.isSameOrSubPath(task.workspaceRoot, this.workspaceRoot);\n        }\n\n        // 尝试从 UI messages 中查找路径线索\n        const uiMessages = task.uiMessages.messages || [];\n\n        for (const msg of uiMessages) {\n            // 检查文件路径\n            if (msg.path && this.isSameOrSubPath(msg.path, this.workspaceRoot)) {\n                return true;\n            }\n\n            // 检查命令执行路径（使用规范化路径比较）\n            if (msg.command && typeof msg.command === 'string') {\n                const normalizedCommand = this.normalizePath(msg.command);\n                if (normalizedCommand.includes(this.workspaceRoot)) {\n                    return true;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 如果无法确定，采用包容策略（返回 true）\n        // 这样可以确保任务不会被意外过滤掉\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 判断路径是否相同或为子路径\n     */\n    private isSameOrSubPath(targetPath: string, basePath: string): boolean {\n        const normalizedTarget = this.normalizePath(targetPath);\n        const normalizedBase = this.normalizePath(basePath);\n        \n        // 完全匹配\n        if (normalizedTarget === normalizedBase) {\n            return true;\n        }\n        \n        // 检查是否为子路径（使用统一的正斜杠）\n        return normalizedTarget.startsWith(normalizedBase + '/');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 规范化路径（跨平台兼容）：\n     * - 将反斜杠转换为正斜杠\n     * - 转换为小写（用于比较）\n     * - 移除末尾斜杠\n     */\n    private normalizePath(p: string): string {\n        if (!p) return '';\n        \n        // 统一使用正斜杠\n        let normalized = p.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\n        \n        // 转换为小写以便比较\n        normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();\n        \n        // 移除尾部斜杠\n        if (normalized.endsWith('/') && normalized.length > 1) {\n            normalized = normalized.slice(0, -1);\n        }\n        \n        return normalized;\n    }\n}"
}

## 📋 跨平台兼容性修复总结

### 修复的文件

| 文件 | 修复内容 |
|------|----------|
| `blackboxai-reader.ts` | 移除了强制 `/` → `\` 转换 |
| `blackboxai-workspace-filter.ts` | 添加统一的 `normalizePath()` 方法 |
| `kilo-reader.ts` | 移除了强制 `/` → `\` 转换 |
| `kilo-workspace-filter.ts` | 重写路径规范化，移除 `path.normalize()` 和 `path.sep` |
| `cline-workspace-filter.ts` | 移除 `path.resolve()` 和 `path.sep`，使用统一正斜杠 |
| `cursor-workspace-filter.ts` | 始终转小写（不再只在 Windows 转） |

### 核心修复策略

所有 workspace filter 现在都使用**统一的路径规范化方法**：

```typescript
private normalizePath(filepath: string): string {
    if (!filepath) return '';
    
    // 1. 统一使用正斜杠（跨平台）
    let normalized = filepath.replace(/\\/g, '/');
    
    // 2. 转换为小写（大小写不敏感比较）
    normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();
    
    // 3. 移除末尾斜杠
    normalized = normalized.replace(/\/$/, '');
    
    return normalized;
}
```

### 测试方法

你可以将编译后的 `dist/` 目录中的文件复制到 Ubuntu 测试：

```bash
# 需要复制的文件：
dist/agents/blackboxai/blackboxai-reader.js
dist/agents/blackboxai/blackboxai-workspace-filter.js
dist/agents/kilo/kilo-reader.js
dist/agents/kilo/kilo-workspace-filter.js
dist/agents/cline/cline-workspace-filter.js
dist/agents/cursor/cursor-workspace-filter.js
```

或者重新打包 VSIX：

```powershell
cd D:\Projects\llm_chat_history
npx vsce package --no-dependencies
```

---

### ⚠️ 注意事项

这些修复确保：
1. **Windows → Linux/Mac**：Windows 保存的数据（反斜杠路径）在 Linux/Mac 上能正确匹配
2. **Linux/Mac → Windows**：Linux/Mac 保存的数据（正斜杠路径）在 Windows 上能正确匹配
3. **大小写敏感性**：路径比较统一使用小写，避免 `D:\Projects` vs `d:\projects` 问题

<details>
<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>

> 我看到问题了！当前的检测逻辑是：```javascript
> const isVSCode = process.env.VSCODE_CWD !== undefined || process.env.VSCODE_PID !== undefined;const isCursor = process.env.CURSOR_PID !== undefined || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER !== undefined;
>
> // 如果明确检测到Cursor环境，使用Cursor路径
> if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {
>     appName = 'Cursor';
> }
> ```问题是：**Cursor 是基于 VS Code 构建的**，所以它可能同时设置了 `VSCODE_CWD` 或 `VSCODE_PID` 环境变量。这导致 `isVSCode` 为 true，即使在 Cursor 中运行，条件 `isCursor && !isVSCode` 也不满足。
>
> 更好的检测策略应该是：
> 1. **优先检测 Cursor**（更具体的环境）
> 2. 然后才回退到 VS Code
>
> 或者可以通过检查 `process.execPath` 来判断是否是 Cursor。
>
> 让我修复这个环境检测逻辑。

</details>

  "new_string": "/**\n * 获取 Cline 存储路径\n */\nexport function getClineStoragePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n\n    // 检测当前运行环境\n    // 注意：Cursor 基于 VS Code，所以 VSCODE_* 环境变量在 Cursor 中也存在\n    // 因此需要优先检测 Cursor 特有的环境变量和可执行路径\n    const appName = detectIDEType();\n    \n    console.log('[Cline] getClineStoragePath:');\n    console.log('[Cline]   - platform:', platform);\n    console.log('[Cline]   - appName:', appName);\n    \n    let storagePath: string;\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        storagePath = path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            `AppData/Roaming/${appName}/User/globalStorage/saoudrizwan.claude-dev`\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        storagePath = path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            `Library/Application Support/${appName}/User/globalStorage/saoudrizwan.claude-dev`\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        storagePath = path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            `.config/${appName}/User/globalStorage/saoudrizwan.claude-dev`\n        );\n    }\n    \n    console.log('[Cline]   - storagePath:', storagePath);\n    return storagePath;\n}\n\n/**\n * 检测当前 IDE 类型\n * 优先检测 Cursor（因为 Cursor 基于 VS Code，会同时设置 VS Code 的环境变量）\n */\nfunction detectIDEType(): 'Code' | 'Cursor' {\n    // 方法1：检查可执行路径（最可靠）\n    const execPath = process.execPath?.toLowerCase() || '';\n    if (execPath.includes('cursor')) {\n        return 'Cursor';\n    }\n    \n    // 方法2：检查 Cursor 特有的环境变量\n    if (process.env.CURSOR_PID || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER) {\n        return 'Cursor';\n    }\n    \n    // 方法3：检查当前工作目录\n    const cwd = process.cwd()?.toLowerCase() || '';\n    if (cwd.includes('cursor')) {\n        return 'Cursor';\n    }\n    \n    // 默认使用 VS Code\n    return 'Code';\n}"
}

ClineTaskHistory,\r\n    ClineTaskMetadata,\r\n    ClineApiConversation,\r\n    ClineUIMessages\r\n} from './cline-types';\r\n\r\nexport class ClineReader {\r\n    private tasksDir: string;\r\n {\r\n        // 读取任务历史索引\r\n        const historyPath = path.join(this.storageDir, 'state', 'taskHistory.json');\r\n        \r\n        if (!fs.existsSync(historyPath)) {\r\n            console.warn('[Cline] Task history file not found:', historyPath);\r\n            return [];\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        let taskItems: ClineTaskHistory['tasks'];\r\n        try {\r\n            const content = fs.readFileSync(historyPath, 'utf-8');\r\n            const parsed = JSON.parse(content);\r\n\r\n            if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {\r\n                taskItems = parsed;\r\n            } else if (parsed.tasks && Array.isArray(parsed.tasks)) {\r\n                taskItems = parsed.tasks;\r\n            } else {\r\n                console.warn('[Cline] Unexpected task history format');\r\n                return [];\r\n            }\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('[Cline] Failed to parse task history:', error);\r\n            return [];\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (!taskItems || taskItems.length === 0) {\r\n            return [];\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const tasks: ClineTask[] = [];\r\n\r\n        for (const taskItem of taskItems) {\r\n            const task = this.getTask(taskItem.id);\r\n            if (task) {\r\n                tasks.push(task);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return tasks;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取指定任务\r\n     */\r\n    getTask(taskId: string): ClineTask | null {\r\n        const taskDir = path.join(this.tasksDir, taskId);\r\n        \r\n        if (!fs.existsSync(taskDir)) {\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 首先读取 UI messages（因为metadata处理需要用到它）\r\n            const uiMessagesPath = path.join(taskDir, 'ui_messages.json');\r\n            const uiMessages: ClineUIMessages = fs.existsSync(uiMessagesPath)\r\n                ? this.parseClineDataFile(uiMessagesPath)\r\n                : { messages: [] };\r\n\r\n            // 读取 metadata\r\n            const metadataPath = path.join(taskDir, 'task_metadata.json');\r\n            const rawMetadata = fs.existsSync(metadataPath)\r\n                ? JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(metadataPath, 'utf-8'))\r\n                : {};\r\n\r\n            // 处理cline的metadata格式，转换为标准格式\r\n            const metadata: ClineTaskMetadata = this.processClineMetadata(rawMetadata, taskId, uiMessages);\r\n\r\n            // 读取 API conversation\r\n            const apiConvPath = path.join(taskDir, 'api_conversation_history.json');\r\n            const apiConversation: ClineApiConversation = fs.existsSync(apiConvPath)\r\n                ? this.parseClineDataFile(apiConvPath)\r\n                : { messages: [] };\r\n            \r\n            // 尝试读取工作区路径（可能在 UI messages 中）\r\n            const workspaceRoot = this.extractWorkspaceRoot(uiMessages);\r\n            \r\n            return {\r\n                id: taskId,\r\n read task ${taskId}:`, error);\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 处理cline的metadata格式，转换为标准格式\r\n     */\r\n    private processClineMetadata(rawMetadata: any, taskId: string, uiMessages: ClineUIMessages): ClineTaskMetadata {\r\n        // 从model_usage中获取时间戳\r\n        const ts = rawMetadata.model_usage?.[0]?.ts || Date.now();\r\n\r\n        // 从UI消息中尝试提取任务名称\r\n        let taskName = 'Untitled Task';\r\n        if (uiMessages.messages && uiMessages.messages.length > 0) {\r\n            const firstMessage = uiMessages.messages[0];\r\n            if (firstMessage.text && typeof firstMessage.text === 'string') {\r\n                // 提取第一行作为任务名称\r\n                const lines = firstMessage.text.split('\\n');\r\n                if (lines[0] && lines[0].trim()) {\r\n                    taskName = lines[0].trim().substring(0, 100); // 限制长度\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 从UI消息中提取token信息\r\n        let }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return {\r\n            version: '1.0',\r\n            id: taskId,\r\n            ts: ts,\r\n            task: taskName,\r\n            tokensIn: tokensIn,\r\n            tokensOut: tokensOut,\r\n            totalCost: totalCost\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 创建默认元数据\r\n     */\r\n    private createDefaultMetadata(taskId: string): ClineTaskMetadata {\r\n        return {\r\n            version: '1.0',\r\n            id: taskId,\r\n            ts: Date.now(),\r\n            task: 'Untitled Task',\r\n            tokensIn: 0,\r\n            tokensOut: 0,\r\n            totalCost: 0\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 解析cline数据文件（支持直接数组和包装对象格式）\r\n     */\r\n    private parseClineDataFile(filePath: string): any {\r\n extractWorkspaceRoot(uiMessages: ClineUIMessages): string | undefined {\r\n        // 尝试从 UI messages 中找到包含路径信息的消息\r\n        for (const msg of uiMessages.messages) {\r\n            // 检查path字段\r\n (process.env.CURSOR_PID || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER) {\r\n        return 'Cursor';\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 方法3：检查当前工作目录\r\n    const cwd = process.cwd()?.toLowerCase() || '';\r\n    if item of content) {\r\n                if (!item) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 处理 text 类型\r\n                if (item.type === 'text' && item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 thinking 类型（Kilo/Cline 的思考过程）\r\n                else if (item.type === 'thinking' && item.thinking) {\r\n parts.push(`🔧 工具调用: ${item.name}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理 tool_result 类型\r\n                else if (item.type === 'tool_result' && item.content) {\r\n                    // tool_result 内容可能很长，只取摘要\r\n                    const resultPreview = typeof item.content === 'string' \r\n                        ? item.content.substring(0, 500) \r\n                        : JSON.stringify(item.content).substring(0, 500);\r\n                    parts.push(`📋 工具结果: ${resultPreview}${item.content?.length > 500 ? '...' : ''}`);\r\n                }\r\n                // 处理其他有 text 字段的类型\r\n                else if (item.text) {\r\n                    parts.push(item.text);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            return parts.join('\\n\\n');\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 处理对象类型（可能有 text 字段）\r\n        if (typeof content === 'object' && content !== null && content.text) {\r\n            return content.text;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function getKiloStoragePath(): string {\r\n    const platform = process.platform;\r\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\r\n\r\n    // 检测当前 IDE 类型（优先检测 Cursor）\r\n    const appName = detectIDEType();\r\n    \r\n    console.log('[Kilo] getKiloStoragePath:');\r\n    console.log('[Kilo]   - ## 🔧 修复内容

### 问题原因
**Cursor 是基于 VS Code 构建的**，所以在 Cursor 中运行时，`VSCODE_CWD` 和 `VSCODE_PID` 等环境变量也会被设置。

旧的检测逻辑：
```javascript
// 这个条件在 Cursor 中永远为 false，因为 isVSCode 也为 true
if (isCursor && !isVSCode) {
    appName = 'Cursor';
}
```

### 新的检测逻辑

现在使用更可靠的多级检测策略：

```javascript
function detectIDEType(): 'Code' | 'Cursor' {
    // 方法1：检查可执行路径（最可靠）
    const execPath = process.execPath?.toLowerCase() || '';
    if (execPath.includes('cursor')) {
        return 'Cursor';
    }
    
    // 方法2：检查 Cursor 特有的环境变量
    if (process.env.CURSOR_PID || process.env.CURSOR_DATA_FOLDER) {
        return 'Cursor';
    }
    
    // 方法3：检查当前工作目录
    const cwd = process.cwd()?.toLowerCase() || '';
    if (cwd.includes('cursor')) {
        return 'Cursor';
    }
    
    // 默认使用 VS Code
    return 'Code';
}
```

### 修复的文件

| 文件 | 修复 |
|------|------|
| `cline-reader.ts` | 新增 `detectIDEType()` 函数 |
| `blackboxai-reader.ts` | 新增 `detectIDEType()` 函数 |
| `kilo-reader.ts` | 新增 `detectIDEType()` 函数 |
